title: White-rect narrow-selector test
descEn: Diagram has viewBackgroundColor=#ffffff (Excalidraw emits leading <path fill='#fff' d='M0 0h...'/> full-canvas rect) PLUS an interior white-filled rectangle at x=120,y=50. Verifies D-07's narrow selector strips only the leading M0 0h... rect and preserves interior white shapes.
